title: Dead Lettering, Poison Messages, Delivery Limits, and Parking · Stakeholder TypeScript Mission
summary: A regional benefit-notification service. They need graceful consumers, same-channel acknowledgements, bounded prefetch, durable inbox effects, failure classification, retry budgets, dead lettering, quorum delivery limits, and an authorized remediation workflow. Planned artifact: Deliver Duplicate-Safe Processing and Poison Recovery System with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case…
objectives: Cancel new deliveries, then await, finish, nack, or abandon in-flight work under a deadline before closing the channel.
Acknowledge, nack, or reject a delivery exactly once on its owning channel and prevent stale or cross-channel tag use.
Bound concurrent handlers by CPU, memory, message bytes, downstream pools, deadlines, tenant fairness, and shutdown capacity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Project Cancel Inflight Boundary
steps.instruction:
project case — A project messaging team handles case 9888 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to route exhausted poison messages through a bound, owned, and retained remediation path; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Project Cancel Inflight Boundary.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for cancel new deliveries, then await, finish, nack, or abandon in-flight work under a deadline before closing the channel. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Project Cancel Inflight Boundary, keep Cancel Inflight Boundary connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Parking Remediation Workflow
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-TypeScript function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-ts-parking-remediation-workflow-1okito" that uses case 4796 to route exhausted poison messages through a bound, owned, and retained remediation path.
